title: Webapp generator
description: Generate a Next.js webapp integrated with @fabio.caffarello/react-design-system. See docs/design/webapp-generator.md for the full design.

name.description: Webapp name (kebab-case, starts with a lowercase letter). Becomes the project's package.json#name and the directory leaf.

directory.description: Workspace-relative directory where the webapp will be created (e.g. apps/<name>). Must be relative (no leading `/`) and must not contain `..` segments.
